evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Je bent altijd op zoek naar hoe je jouw (interne) klant het beste helpt, in plaats van de letterlijke vraag te beantwoorden.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: There is no clear rigour language (no testing, governance, compliance) nor clear velocity/speed language; the JD is framed around dashboard maintenance and stakeholder helpfulness, landing between the two as mixed given weak signal on both sides.
evidence.domain_risk: duurzaamheid en mobiliteit tot resourceplanningen en projectmonitoring
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: This is internal operational reporting (sustainability, mobility, resource planning, project monitoring) for an engineering consultancy with no financial reporting or regulatory exposure named, matching low domain risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Je team bestaat uit 4 collega's en maakt onderdeel uit van de Informatie Management & Digital Support
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named, existing BI team of 4 people sits within a broader IM & Digital Support function with an established dataplatform, indicating the function exists and is growing rather than greenfield or fully mature at scale.
evidence.jd_authorship: ontwikkelen en beheren van PowerBI dashboards
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Named tools (Power BI, SQL, Python) with some context are present but the responsibilities remain fairly generic ("ontsluiten en analyseren van data", "afstemmen met interne klanten"), giving a mix of specific and generic.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: waarbij we ons met name bezighouden met data inzichtelijk en beschikbaar maken voor onze collega's
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The team's stated mission is making data insightful and available for colleagues broadly (a data platform/BI community function) rather than one specific commercial, product, or finance audience, closest to internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: lever je met jouw expertise een actieve bijdrage aan de interne (Power)BI community, geef je (op termijn) ook PowerBI cursussen aan collega's
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines strategic community-building and training ownership ("opbouwen en beheren van onze data community") with execution-oriented dashboard maintenance and stakeholder support, a genuine mix.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools, AI-assisted coding, or AI-consuming infrastructure appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data contracts, or data quality framework language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery, helpfulness, and community-building terms with no risk register, compliance, or reliability language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: het verbeteren en onderhouden van goede dashboards
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role improves and maintains existing dashboards and an existing dataplatform rather than building new infrastructure from zero, so fix/scale.
evidence.language_gate: goede beheersing van het Nederlands en Engels
